headline: Is Brown & Brown (BRO) Now At An Attractive Price After Its 42% One-Year Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether Brown & Brown's current share price offers value or not, it helps to first frame what recent returns and fundamentals are actually telling you. The stock recently closed at US$69.19, with a 1.1% gain over 30 days but a 42.0% decline over 1 year and a 10.9% decline year to date, which may catch the eye of investors reassessing the risk and reward trade off. Over a longer horizon, Brown & Brown has posted returns of 29.9% over 3 years and 57.9% over 5 years, which...

headline: Barksdale Announces Shares for Debt Transaction
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - March 17, 2026) - Barksdale Resources Corp. headline: Is Brown & Brown (BRO) Quietly Redefining Its Moat Amid AI Scrutiny and Dealership Expansion?
summary: In recent days, Brown & Brown, Inc. has faced cautious analyst commentary about how artificial intelligence could affect insurance brokerages, while also expanding its dealership-focused capabilities through Brown & Brown Dealer Services’ acquisition of The Protectorate Group Insurance Agency’s assets across the United States. This combination of technology-related scrutiny and continued acquisition-driven expansion highlights how Brown & Brown is balancing potential industry disruption with...
